_source: Cross-system change feed (last 24h): Attio, AI news, policy trackers, invitation tracker

events.summary: Mira left OpenAI last month to found an evals startup (EvalWorks) — her Attio profile still lists OpenAI.
Neel's interpretability work is the most-cited frontier-safety result this quarter — rising influence.
US Frontier Model Oversight Act advanced to committee draft; Sara (Senate staff) is the lead author.
A major lab shipped open weights for a frontier-class model — open-weights norms are suddenly the hottest governance topic.
Demis (Google DeepMind) invitation still unanswered after 50 days — VIP RSVP at risk.
EU AI Office invite unanswered (42 days) and her Attio profile is missing title/contact fields.
